name: @acarmisc/backstage-plugin-litellm-chat-monorepo
description: LiteLLM RAG Chat plugin packages for Backstage. Designed for use within Backstage monorepo.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @acarmisc/backstage-plugin-litellm-chat build && yarn workspace @acarmisc/backstage-plugin-litellm-chat-backend build
scripts.test: echo 'Use from Backstage monorepo: yarn workspace @acarmisc/backstage-plugin-litellm-chat test'
scripts.lint: echo 'Use from Backstage monorepo: yarn workspace @acarmisc/backstage-plugin-litellm-chat lint'
